_meta.audit: Region-aware helpline directory. Numbers verified against official / government / reputable-nonprofit sources (2026) — NONE invented. `dialString` is what a tel: link dials; short codes (TR) are domestic-only and flagged. Reachable in one tap from Settings and from every slip/panic flow (MVP §6.7). No shame or medical-claim copy.
MUST_VERIFY_BEFORE_SHIP: TR mentalHealth ALO 182: only third-party-verified this session; confirm on an official Sağlık Bakanlığı page. 112 is the confirmed fallback and is included.
TR alcohol YEDAM 115: operating hours not stated on official page.

US compulsive-behavior: NO verified dedicated national hotline exists; the circulating 1-800-837-9041 is unverified/likely defunct and was deliberately excluded. NAMI + 988 used as the neutral, non-shaming fallback.

resources.name: 1-800-QUIT-NOW
resources.descr: Free, confidential quitline — routes to your state program. Multiple languages.

resources.name: SAMHSA National Helpline
resources.descr: Free, confidential treatment referral & information. Not a counseling line.

resources.name: 988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline
resources.descr: Call or text, free and confidential. Call, text, chat, or ASL video.

resources.name: NAMI HelpLine
resources.descr: Non-judgmental information and referrals, including for compulsive behaviors. For crisis, use 988.

resources.name: ALO 171 — Sigara Bırakma Danışma Hattı
resources.descr: Sağlık Bakanlığı sigarayı bırakma danışma hattı. Ücretsiz ve gizli.

resources.name: YEDAM — 115 Danışma Hattı
resources.descr: Yeşilay danışma hattı: alkol, madde, kumar ve internet bağımlılığı. Uzman psikologlar, ücretsiz ve gizli.

resources.name: ALO 182 — Yaşam Hattı
resources.descr: Ruhsal kriz, yoğun kaygı ve intihar düşünceleri için psikolog/sosyal çalışmacı desteği.
resources.verifyNote: Resmî Sağlık Bakanlığı sayfasında doğrulayın; doğrulanana kadar 112 birincil güvenli seçenektir.

resources.name: 112 — Acil Çağrı
resources.descr: Hayati tehlike (intihar girişimi, aşırı doz) durumunda ulusal acil numara.
